articles.title: Ripple Helps Bring New Euro-Pegged Stablecoin to XRP Ledger
articles.description: The team behind the largest euro-backed stablecoin is announcing integration with Ripple Lab’s XRP Ledger (XRPL). In a new blog post, Stasis, the company behind STASIS EURO (EURS), says they have completed integrating EURS into the XRP Ledger. articles.title: XRP Lawsuit: SEC Case Takes Surprising Turn As Coinbase Asks Court For Permission To Support Ripple

articles.title: Here’s how much Elon Musk has pumped Dogecoin this year
articles.description: Elon Musk has tweeted about Dogecoin 16 times this year. Even in a bear market, pumps of up to 39% have coincided with his doge posts.
